## tscli set device invite

Set device invite status

### Synopsis

Resend or accept a device invite. Valid statuses: resend, accept

```
tscli set device invite [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for invite
      --id string       Invite ID, URL, or code (required)
      --status string   Action to perform: resend or accept
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
